falsification_rule_text: The hypothesis is considered falsified if the pre-registered empirical test shows the opposite direction of the claim at conventional significance (p > 0.10), or if the primary outcome measure moves less than 10% in the claimed direction across the sample. Exact thresholds will be pinned in the variables and estimator blocks when this stub is promoted from draft.
falsification_test_text: Descriptive comparison of Exxon/Shell/BP/Chevron 1980-2020 reported reserves (10-K filings) converted to combustion-CO2 vs IPCC AR6 1.5C remaining carbon budget; firm+year-level. Refute if combined firm reserves' combustion-CO2 not >2x the global 1.5C budget at any 5-year window OR if internal climate-knowledge documents pre-1990 are not contemporaneous with reserve expansion.
